```{r} library(tidyverse) library(tidyselect) library(tibble) library(sf) library(tigris) library(lubridate) library(tidygeocoder) library(gt) library(gtsummary) # nice count visualizations library(forcats) # a specific data wrangling issue library(here) library(readxl) ``` THIS IS STILL A MAJOR WORK IN PROGRESS. I JUST HAVE THE RAW FORMAT HERE. # The United States > Need to fix this so that it's not a whole list printed in the html file ```{r} daniel_travel_map <- readxl::read_xlsx("trip_data.xlsx") daniel_travel_map |> dplyr::select(-desc, -start_date, -end_date) |> knitr::kable(format = "html") ``` This does not count the states I have actually lived in. Not all trips I have done in my life are included. These are just ones I thought were memorable. I also don't count just passing through a state. ```{r} visit_counts <- daniel_travel_map |> count(state, name = "visits") # US states shapefile us <- states(cb = TRUE) |> shift_geometry() #for alaska and hawaii # Join counts to map map_data <- us |> left_join( visit_counts, by=c("NAME" = "state") ) |> mutate( visits = ifelse(is.na(visits), 0, visits) ) st_bbox(map_data) # Plot ggplot(map_data) + geom_sf(aes(fill = visits)) + coord_sf(xlim = c(-3500000, 3500000), ylim = c(-2500000, 2500000), expand = FALSE) + scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Trips") + scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "blue") + theme_minimal() ``` Make a shiny app where I have a date slider. I want to see the timeline on when I visit states Or maybe something that hovers so I can see where and when I last went Also a visual that has lines between states to show a rough path towards everything. Also add a travel wish list (with coordinates) so I can keep them somewhere other than google maps. Maybe there's a way to extract coordinates from google maps...
